scripts.postbuild: cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && for r in ice-tourism daeli-farm eldhestar guesthouse-carina gj-travel admin/previews outreach preview/erpsstadir preview/tjoruhusid preview/ektafiskur preview/kaffihornid preview/seakayak preview/weider preview/austri preview/lysulaugar preview/hespa preview/reykkofinn preview/galdrasyning preview/saudarkroksbakari preview/reykjavikdistillery preview/beffatours preview/kogga preview/haafell preview/polarhestar preview/eyjatours preview/fischersetur preview/edinborg preview/brunastadir preview/glacierparadise preview/sireksstadir preview/comparison; do mkdir -p "dist/$r" && cp dist/index.html "dist/$r/index.html"; done
